name: Postgres Schema Explorer
author: QoreDB
description: A pack of PostgreSQL schema-inspection queries — foreign keys, unindexed FK columns, sequences nearing overflow, enum types, duplicate indexes and documentation coverage. Insert them from the snippets menu in the query editor.

snippets.label: Foreign keys overview
snippets.description: Every foreign key, its columns, and the table/columns it references.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  c.conname AS constraint,
  src.relname AS table,
  string_agg(srcatt.attname, ', ' ORDER BY k.ord) AS columns,
  tgt.relname AS references_table,
  string_agg(tgtatt.attname, ', ' ORDER BY k.ord) AS references_columns
FROM pg_constraint c
JOIN pg_class src ON src.oid = c.conrelid
JOIN pg_class tgt ON tgt.oid = c.confrelid
JOIN LATERAL unnest(c.conkey, c.confkey) WITH ORDINALITY AS k(src_attnum, tgt_attnum, ord) ON true
JOIN pg_attribute srcatt ON srcatt.attrelid = c.conrelid AND srcatt.attnum = k.src_attnum
JOIN pg_attribute tgtatt ON tgtatt.attrelid = c.confrelid AND tgtatt.attnum = k.tgt_attnum
WHERE c.contype = 'f'
GROUP BY c.conname, src.relname, tgt.relname
ORDER BY src.relname, c.conname;

snippets.label: Unindexed foreign keys
snippets.description: Foreign keys with no index leading on their columns — a common cause of slow deletes and joins.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  c.conrelid::regclass AS table,
  c.conname AS fk_constraint,
  pg_get_constraintdef(c.oid) AS definition
FROM pg_constraint c
WHERE c.contype = 'f'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM pg_index i
    WHERE i.indrelid = c.conrelid
      AND (string_to_array(i.indkey::text, ' ')::int[])[1:cardinality(c.conkey)] = c.conkey::int[]
  )
ORDER BY c.conrelid::regclass::text;

snippets.label: Sequences nearing overflow
snippets.description: Sequences closest to their maximum value — watch these before an integer PK runs out.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  schemaname AS schema,
  sequencename AS sequence,
  last_value,
  max_value,
  round(100 * last_value::numeric / max_value, 1) AS pct_used
FROM pg_sequences
WHERE last_value IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY last_value::numeric / max_value DESC
LIMIT 20;

snippets.label: Enum types and values
snippets.description: Every user-defined enum type and its labels, in sort order.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  n.nspname AS schema,
  t.typname AS enum_type,
  string_agg(e.enumlabel, ', ' ORDER BY e.enumsortorder) AS values
FROM pg_type t
JOIN pg_enum e ON e.enumtypid = t.oid
JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = t.typnamespace
GROUP BY n.nspname, t.typname
ORDER BY n.nspname, t.typname;

snippets.label: Duplicate indexes
snippets.description: Indexes covering the exact same columns on a table — redundant write overhead.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  indrelid::regclass AS table,
  array_agg(indexrelid::regclass ORDER BY indexrelid) AS duplicate_indexes
FROM pg_index
GROUP BY indrelid, indkey
HAVING count(*) > 1
ORDER BY indrelid::regclass::text;

snippets.label: Column inventory
snippets.description: Every column with its type, nullability and default — a quick data dictionary.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  table_schema AS schema,
  table_name AS table,
  column_name AS column,
  data_type,
  is_nullable,
  column_default
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')
ORDER BY table_schema, table_name, ordinal_position;

snippets.label: Documentation coverage
snippets.description: Tables and their comments, undocumented ones first — find what still needs a COMMENT ON.
snippets.template:
SELECT
  n.nspname AS schema,
  c.relname AS table,
  obj_description(c.oid) AS comment
FROM pg_class c
JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
WHERE c.relkind = 'r'
  AND n.nspname NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')
ORDER BY (obj_description(c.oid) IS NOT NULL), n.nspname, c.relname;
